programs.title: Guy Montgomery's Guy Mont Spelling Bee
programs.desc: The carryover champ defends their crown against Frank Woodley, Shabana Azeez and Sarah Keyworth, as Sam Campbell ramps up the chaos with \.

programs.title: Urzila
programs.desc: Urzila explodes over a courtesy wave, launches Hire-A-Lez, destroys self-help books, plays a menopausal cop, goes to Karen rehab and attends a cougar funeral.

programs.title: Bad Company
programs.desc: Julia is determined to get The Argyle on track with performance reviews, creating chaos as Margie's new play is about to open. Meanwhile Julia's son Ryan wanders the halls, catching Margie's eye.

programs.title: Planet America
programs.desc: Chas and John cover the latest from the Middle East, the Strait of Hormuz, the ceasefire and peace talks, plus King Charles' State Visit to mark the 250 years of American independence.

programs.title: ABC Late News
programs.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Jade Barker in Perth.

programs.title: The Business
programs.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, employees and business owners big and small. Presented by Kirsten Aiken.
